Name: FSkeletalMeshLODInfo
Description: Struct containing information for a particular LOD level, such as materials and info for when to use it.

Variables.Name: ScreenSize
Variables.Description:
ScreenSize to display this LOD.
	  The screen size is based around the projected diameter of the bounding
	  sphere of the model. i.e. 0.5 means half the screen's maximum dimension.

Variables.Name: LODHysteresis
Variables.Description: Used to avoid 'flickering' when on LOD boundary. Only taken into account when moving from complex->simple.

Variables.Name: LODMaterialMap
Variables.Description: Mapping table from this LOD's materials to the USkeletalMesh materials array.

Variables.Name: bEnableShadowCasting_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Per-section control over whether to enable shadow casting.

Variables.Name: bHasBeenSimplified
Variables.Description: Whether to disable morph targets for this LOD.

Variables.Name: ReductionSettings
Variables.Description: Reduction settings to apply when building render data.

Variables.Name: RemeshingSettings_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Remeshing settings to apply when building render data.

Variables.Name: RemovedBones_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: This has been removed in editor. We could re-apply this in import time or by mesh reduction utilities

Variables.Name: BonesToRemove
Variables.Description: Bones which should be removed from the skeleton for the LOD level

Variables.Name: BakePose
Variables.Description: Pose which should be used to reskin vertex influences for which the bones will be removed in this LOD level, uses ref-pose by default

Variables.Name: SourceImportFilename
Variables.Description: The filename of the file tha was used to import this LOD if it was not auto generated.
